SELECT erf(3 / sqrt(2)) AS erf_value FROM test_erf WHERE value > 0;
SELECT value, erf(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_erf WHERE value < 0) AS negative_values;
SELECT (SELECT erf(x) FROM test_erf WHERE value = 2) + (SELECT erf(x) FROM test_erf WHERE value = -2) AS combined_erf;
CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, val FLOAT);
WITH (SELECT MAX(val) FROM test_data) AS max_value SELECT erf(max_value) AS erf_of_max;
SELECT A.id, erf(A.val), B.val FROM test_data A JOIN test_data B ON A.id < B.id WHERE B.val > 1;
SELECT erf(5.5), erf(10) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT val FROM test_data) AS distinct_values;
SELECT ROUND(erf(value), 3) AS rounded_erf FROM test_erf WHERE value BETWEEN -2 AND 2;
SELECT value, erf(value) FROM (SELECT * FROM test_erf WHERE value IN (SELECT DISTINCT val FROM test_data)) AS common_values;
